---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that is hard or impossible today? Describe the situation, not the solution. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What do you think should happen? Be concrete. "Add a text-overlay subsystem" is too vague; "add a top-bar button that opens a modal with a text input and a position picker" is useful. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any other approaches you thought about, and why you ruled them out. -->

## Scope

<!-- Which of these describes this request? -->

- [ ] Small: isolated change, a few files, a day of work
- [ ] Medium: touches multiple components or introduces a new pattern
- [ ] Large: new subsystem, new dependency, or architectural change

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots from other apps, links to similar features, anything that clarifies intent. -->
